summary: Full E2E validation of Pahadi Pharma Assistant. Backend: 8/8 pytest cases passed (1 skipped for audio per plan) - health, medical-query EN/HI, red-flag detection, identify-medicine with real PNG, history list (no _id leak), history delete, persistence verified. Frontend: All 12 flows passed via Playwright on 390x844 viewport - home render, EN/HI language toggle with Devanagari title update, text query -> /result with result-card + disclaimer-banner, red-flag-banner on severe chest pain, history screen shows stored queries, camera modal with 3 options, back navigation.

react_native_issues.issue: TouchableWithoutFeedback is deprecated (console warning). Consider migrating to Pressable.
expo-av is deprecated in SDK 54. Plan migration to expo-audio/expo-video.

action_items: Optional: migrate expo-av -> expo-audio to silence deprecation warnings
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated; prefer lifespan handlers (non-blocking).
GET /api/history correctly excludes _id via projection {_id: 0} - good.
Gemini response JSON fence-stripping fallback present; _coerce_response provides safe defaults for missing fields.
seed_data_creation: Created then cleared history via API during tests; no permanent seed data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. testIDs all in kebab-case and match those listed in review request. Audio transcription endpoint is intentionally skipped in pytest (no fixture). Gemini key is live and gemini-flash-latest returns valid JSON consistently.
